name: PointClickCare Senior Living EHR API
what_it_does: PointClickCare REST API for senior living and long-term post-acute care (LTPAC) EHR platform. Enables AI agents to access resident clinical records and care plans, manage skilled nursing and assisted living workflows, retrieve MDS assessment and quality measure data, handle Medicare and Medicaid billing and claims, access medication administration records, manage care team coordination, integrate with pharmacy systems, and connect LTPAC data with health system partners and payers.
use_cases: Accessing resident clinical records and care plans from senior care coordination agents
Managing MDS assessments and quality reporting from skilled nursing compliance agents
Processing Medicare and Medicaid billing from revenue cycle management agents
Integrating medication administration data with pharmacy systems from medication management agents
not_for: Acute hospital care without LTPAC continuum focus
Home health without facility-based care workflows
Non-clinical senior living without skilled nursing requirements
best_when: A skilled nursing facility, assisted living community, or continuing care retirement community using PointClickCare wants AI agents to automate clinical documentation, quality reporting, billing, and care coordination.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Resident PHI is highly sensitive and includes elderly vulnerable populations. All agent access requires BAA. Clinical documentation automation requires clinical oversight. MDS submission errors can affect Medicare reimbursement.

auth.notes: PointClickCare uses OAuth 2.0 with SMART on FHIR for interoperability. Facility-level credentials with resident-level access control. Partner marketplace program for technology integrations. Scopes control clinical, billing, medication, and reporting access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — LTPAC enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-bed and per-facility enterprise pricing; health system pricing for large operators
pricing.notes: Mississauga, Ontario Canada. Founded 2000. Market leader for North American long-term care EHR. 27,000+ care settings. 800M+ care interactions recorded. Used by most large skilled nursing chains and assisted living operators. Dominant LTPAC platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Elderly vulnerable population PHI — highest sensitivity category
No public MCP server — OAuth2 with SMART on FHIR partner program
MDS assessments are federally mandated — submission errors affect Medicare reimbursement
SMART on FHIR preferred for clinical integrations — native API for operational integrations
Canadian PIPEDA compliance alongside HIPAA for US/Canada cross-border data
Partner marketplace approval required — not self-service API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Elderly resident PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC, PIPEDA. OAuth2 + SMART on FHIR. US/Canadian data residency. BAA required. Highest-sensitivity vulnerable population data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Elderly resident PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC, PIPEDA. OAuth2 + SMART on FHIR. US/Canadian data residency. Highest sensitivity.
